name: BSA Calculator (Mosteller Formula) - MedCentral
snippet: Body Surface Area (BSA) is a measure of the total outer surface area of the body, calculated using the Mosteller formula or square root method.

name: Body Surface Area (BSA) Calculator | Mosteller, Du Bois  - Pearson
snippet: Use BSA = √((height × weight)/3600). Substitute: BSA = √((175 × 72)/3600 ... BSA estimates body surface area, while BMI compares weight to height squared.

name: Body Surface Area Calculator – BSA - GlobalRPH
snippet: 1. Mosteller Formula: It is calculated by multiplying the person's height in cm with his/her weight in kilograms and dividing the value by 3600.

name: Body Surface Area (BSA) calculator - CancerCalc
snippet: The Mosteller formula is commonly used and is calculated using the following formula: √ height (cm) x weight (kg)/ 3600. References: 1. Mosteller R.
